_comment: EDITOR-CONTROLLED fire restrictions. The conditions worker reads it every 15 min and folds it into the Alert tile + the /conditions banner. To change: set stage to none|1|2 and update the fields. See docs/FIRE-RESTRICTIONS.md and worker/README.md.
scope: NF lands below 8,000 ft (incl. Vallecito Lake); designated Wilderness excluded
summary: No campfires, charcoal, or wood/coal stove fires; no outdoor smoking. Propane/gas stoves OK. $530 min fine.
